reasoning: The FIDE ranking list on Wikipedia is updated monthly to reflect official FIDE releases (which usually happen on the 1st of the month). As of Feb 28, 2026 (the March 2026 list), Lê Quang Liêm is ranked 19th with a rating of 2731. Because FIDE only issues official standard rating lists monthly, his Wikipedia ranking will remain static at 19 until the April 2026 list is published and the Wikipedia page is updated. There is virtually no chance of an official mid-month update, so his rank on March 8 will definitively remain 19 (resolving YES). For March 31, FIDE typically publishes its monthly ratings on the 1st of the month (April 1). Thus, there's a very high probability the Wikipedia page will still reflect the March rating list on March 31, meaning his rank will still be 19. Even if the April list is published and updated early on Wikipedia (on March 31), Liêm could maintain his rank or move up if players slightly ahead of him (like Niemann) drop points, or move down if players slightly below (Aronian, Van Foreest) gain points. This added variance slightly lowers the certainty for March 31, but 'YES' remains highly probable.
